name: Gold Pride - It's Neck and Neck!
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＧＰ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゴールド・プライド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ネック・アンド・ネック
desc: Target 1 "Gold Pride" monster you control or 1 "Gold Pride" card in your GY, except "Gold Pride - It's Neck and Neck!"; return it to the hand. If your opponent controls a monster with higher ATK than your LP: You can banish this card and 1 "Gold Pride" monster from your GY; Special Summon 1 other "Gold Pride" monster from your Extra Deck that mentions that banished monster's name. You can only use each effect of "Gold Pride - It's Neck and Neck!" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 "Gold Pride" monster you control or 1 "Gold Pride" card in your GY, except "Gold Pride - It's Neck and Neck!"; return it to the hand. If your opponent controls a monster with higher ATK than your LP: You can banish this card and 1 "Gold Pride" monster from your GY; Special Summon 1 other "Gold Pride" monster from your Extra Deck that mentions that banished monster's name. You can only use each effect of "Gold Pride - It's Neck and Neck!" once per turn.

mentions: Gold Pride - It's Neck and Neck!
action: Returns from your field to your hand
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
